name: Varex Imaging Corporation
description: Varex Imaging Corporation is a leading global designer and manufacturer of X-ray imaging components and solutions. As the world’s largest independent supplier of medical X-ray tubes and image processing solutions, the company provides critical technology for medical, industrial, and security imaging applications. Headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah, Varex Imaging serves a diverse range of original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) worldwide, helping them develop advanced diagnostic and inspection systems. Their extensive portfolio includes X-ray sources, digital detectors, and software, all engineered to enhance image quality, improve patient outcomes, and increase operational efficiency across various healthcare and industrial sectors.
